description: A service advisor is preparing for a major service appointment and needs to pre-order parts that are not kept in stock.

nodes.task_description: Review the upcoming appointment and identify the required non-stock parts (e.g., a timing belt kit).

expected_outcome.value: Agent identifies the need for a timing belt kit for the scheduled appointment.

nodes.task_description: Check the regional parts distribution center for availability.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the part is in stock at the regional warehouse.

nodes.task_description: Place an order for the part to be delivered to the dealership before the appointment date.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully places the order and links it to the repair order.
